mapper.select:
select dr.id, dr.room_name, dr.topic, dr.room_status, dr.max_member_count, dr.duration_minutes, dr.current_member_count, dr.auto_start, dr.start_time, dr.end_time, dr.created_by, dr.create_time, dr.update_time from discussion_room dr where 1 = 1
AND dr.room_name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.roomName},"%")
AND dr.topic like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.topic},"%")
AND dr.room_status = #{queryForm.roomStatus}
order by dr.create_time desc
